title: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Chandigarh location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
